name: ERPSMART Builder Studio End-to-End Smoke Contract
purpose: Verify that the Builder Studio backend Control Plane can create a temporary definition, create a version snapshot, validate it, render a safe preview, record a preview run, and clean up without publishing or writing runtime modules.
smoke_steps: rewrite the fixture to a unique SmokeRecords module name
disable warning-only future capabilities for a clean validation path
assert preview output reports Real runtime writes performed: 0
assert preview path is under storage/app/module-builder-preview
assert no modules/{SmokeModule} runtime directory exists
cleanup temporary DB records and unique preview artifacts
cleanup_rules: delete temporary builder_preview_runs for the smoke definition
delete temporary builder_definition_versions for the smoke definition
delete storage/app/builder-definitions/{id} for the smoke record
delete only the uniquely named storage/app/module-builder-preview/{SmokeModule} directory created by this smoke
do not delete shared preview directories
forbidden_operations: modify SaaS, licensing, updater, installer, package, composer, vendor, node_modules, or public/build files
agent_notes: This smoke may create temporary DB records but must clean them up.
This smoke may create a unique preview directory under storage/app/module-builder-preview and may delete only that unique directory.
The smoke is allowed to call validate and preview, but not publish.
The preview output must confirm zero real runtime writes.
demo_notes: Run before moving to the Visual Form Layout Builder.
A PASS proves the demo path is wired across DB, services, preview engine, and UI response assumptions.
It does not prove publish safety because publish remains intentionally absent.
